content.text:
Based on my analysis of the zoomed-in view of atom 28, I can now identify the covalently connected neighbor atoms:

**Neighbor atoms of C:28 (atomic index 28):**

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 24 | C |
| 27 | C |
| 31 | H |

**geomconf_index:** 4761

The carbon atom at index 28 is part of an aromatic ring structure and is covalently bonded to two other carbon atoms (C:24 and C:27) that are also part of the ring, and one hydrogen atom (H:31) that is attached to complete its valence.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 28, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
